title: Wash Dyed Items
description: Wash any dyed items to turn them white.
body:
![wse](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3303558547c0624a9655969aaac065b9e363eb5d.png)

Undo your dye mistakes — and refresh your style.

Ever dyed your armor or blocks the wrong color? Wash Dyed Items lets you easily remove dye colors and restore items to their original state — no commands, no hassle.

## Wash Off Dye from:

leather armor

Bundles

Harness

Wool items

Shulker boxes

Candles

Simply drop use a crafting recipe to clean it.

Get your base item back and reuse your dyes freely.

## Perfect For

Builders who change palettes often.

Survival players who hate wasting dyes.

Servers that want small, useful quality-of-life features.

# Compatibility

Works as both a Datapack and a Fabric/Quilt Mod.
Fully compatible with Minecraft 1.20+.
ightweight no external dependencies.

Simple. Clean. Satisfying.

Bring a touch of realism and forgiveness to Minecraft crafting.
